image_prompts: Bright modern Prague office, natural daylight flooding through large windows. A focused man in his 30s sits at a clean desk with an open laptop showing blurred colorful dashboard shapes. Expression: calm, concentrated. Wide shot, clean minimal aesthetic, soft shadows.

Close-up of the same man's face: a slight frown, eyes shifting from the laptop. His hand rests on the desk mid-motion, as if interrupted. Warm office lighting, shallow depth of field, background colleagues visible but blurred.

Wide shot pulling back to reveal the open-plan office behind him: several colleagues sitting idle at their desks, arms crossed or looking at phones, waiting. The man in the foreground holds a phone to his ear, expression tense. Bright daylight, modern office furniture, nobody is working.
Empty, spotlessly clean office kitchen: white countertops, gleaming sink, tidy shelving. Bright natural light. No people. Calm, airy, orderly — a clear visual contrast to the previous scene of chaos.

The same man back at his desk, laptop open with soft abstract UI glowing on screen, posture relaxed, slight smile. Clean organized desk, bright office environment. A small CleanStay-branded card or paper visible as a subtle prop near the keyboard — not the focus, just present.
